/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -mtune=native -Wall -Wextra -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tpu_wcet_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tpu_wcet_test.dir/test_tpu_worker_wcet.cpp.o -o tpu_wcet_test   -L/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/tflite/lib  -L/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/tflite/lib:/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil/lib -lpthread
